backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the IASA Challenge app that wires together access control and user approval modules, and defines types/logic for user profiles, squad roles, participation levels, projects, tasks, pledges, and voting.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—skipping ProfileSetupModal for existing users and restricting profile creation to admins—to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for what each component, hook, or utility does in the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React frontend, setting the page title to 'IASA Challenge (Alpha Sandbox) v0.3' and mounting the app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and InternetIdentityProvider, then renders MainApp with a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component that allows administrators to view user profiles, update participation levels, and manage user approvals (approve/reject) via collapsible sections.
frontend/src/components/CompleteProjectB: Small button component that triggers the `useCompleteProject` mutation to mark a project as completed and shows a success or error toast.
frontend/src/components/CreateProjectDia: Dialog form for creating new projects with fields for title, description, HH estimates, monetary value, and resource link; disables controls while the backend actor is initializing.
frontend/src/components/CreateTaskDialog: A dialog component for creating new project tasks, validating title and HH budget against available project budget, and submitting via the useCreateTask mutation.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard component displaying user stats, a projects tab, and a decision log timeline built from project status history.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright, a heart icon, a caffeine.ai link, and the app version string.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with the app logo/title and a user dropdown menu showing profile info, participation level, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Landing/login screen displaying app branding, a feature grid, and an Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/components/MainApp.tsx: Root app shell that sequences through loading, authentication, and profile-existence checks before rendering the Header, Dashboard, optional AdminPanel, Footer, and ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/PeerRatingSectio: Card component that lets authenticated users select a project participant and submit a 0–5 star peer rating via the useRatePeer mutation.
frontend/src/components/PledgeSection.ts: Displays and manages pledges for a project, allowing PMs to confirm pending pledges and reassign general-pool pledges to specific tasks, with status badges and totals.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to register a profile by entering a username and selecting a participation level and squad role.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Card component that summarizes a project's status, pledge progress, prize money, payout per HH, and participant count, with a button to open the details dialog.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailsDi: Dialog that shows full project details in tabs (tasks, pledges, share of pool, peer ratings) and includes a complete-project button for active projects.
frontend/src/components/ProjectsTab.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of ProjectCard components for a list of projects, or an empty-state message when none exist.
frontend/src/components/ShareOfPoolSecti: Displays each participant's share of the prize pool based on their confirmed pledged HH, excluding pending and expired pledges.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: React component that renders a single task card with status badges, action buttons (accept, complete, approve, pledge, confirm), and role-aware next-step guidance for project managers, assignees, and mentors.
frontend/src/components/TasksSection.tsx: React component that displays the full tasks section for a project, including a budget banner, task lifecycle legend, and a list of TaskCard components with a create-task dialog for PMs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profile management, project/task/pledge CRUD operations, and admin actions using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 5, documenting two pending fix requests: restoring the AdminPanel removed in a Version 24 regression and fixing the profile setup flow to handle pre-existing users gracefully instead of silently failing.
